# iproute_tunnel (Resource)

Manages an IP tunnel (ip tunnel). Wraps link types gre/sit/ipip.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# GRE tunnel
resource "iproute_tunnel" "gre" {
  name   = "gre1"
  mode   = "gre"
  local  = "10.0.0.1"
  remote = "10.0.0.2"
  ttl    = 64
}

# IPIP tunnel
resource "iproute_tunnel" "ipip" {
  name   = "ipip1"
  mode   = "ipip"
  local  = "10.0.0.1"
  remote = "10.0.0.2"
}

# SIT tunnel (IPv6-in-IPv4)
resource "iproute_tunnel" "sit" {
  name   = "sit1"
  mode   = "sit"
  local  = "10.0.0.1"
  remote = "10.0.0.2"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mode` (String) Tunnel mode: gre, sit, ipip.
- `name` (String) Tunnel interface name.

### Optional

- `local` (String) Local endpoint.
- `remote` (String) Remote endpoint.
- `tos` (Number) TOS.
- `ttl` (Number) TTL.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
